name: architecture-review-roundtable
stop_condition: Stop after max_rounds and produce a decision-oriented architecture review.

turns.name: proposal-analysis
turns.instruction: Analyze the architecture proposal. Identify goals, constraints, tradeoffs, coupling, failure modes, and migration risks.

turns.name: design-critique
turns.instruction: Critique the architecture. Focus on brittle assumptions, operational burden, data flow, security, observability, and rollback. Put only the substantive critique inside the configured roundtable-output markers.

turns.name: decision-synthesis
turns.instruction: Synthesize the proposal and critique into options, recommendation, decision gates, and remaining disagreement.

final.name: final-architecture-review
final.instruction: Produce a final architecture review with Recommendation, Rationale, Risks, Decision Gates, and Next Actions.
